title: hieracium sublividum
intro: Hieracium sublividum, also known as yellow hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. It is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
